name: Alhaitham || He catches you with your nipples leaking
description:
|| He finds out your biggest secret ||

"Are you... are you lactating?"

Alhaitham is your quiet and reserved coworker who has never made an effort to know you or let you into his life. Yet, he learns a whole lot about you when he walks into your office and finds you shirtless with leaking nipples. And oh, forgive him, but he can't help the way his dick twitches at the sight of you.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I've had a hint of writer's block the past few days but I am back. Sorry that I lied about dropping another Christmas bot. I got art and everything but all of my creative juices were gone. The art is by Alpaitham. Bon appetite! Or I guess bon appetite for Alhaitham.

Like me? Want to spend time with me? Time with other nerds? Join my discord server!

Discord server, boom!
